job.title: Digital Fabrication Assistant
job.description: Innovative Tech Lab is seeking a passionate Digital Fabrication Assistant to join our dynamic team. This entry-level role combines skills from design, engineering, and programming to support our projects in digital fabrication and rapid prototyping. You will work closely with engineers and designers to create, test, and refine prototypes using cutting-edge technology. If you are enthusiastic about merging technology with creativity and want to be part of a pioneering environment, we would love to hear from you.

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Design, or related field

job.title: Healthcare Data Liaison Specialist
job.description: As a Healthcare Data Liaison Specialist at Innovative Health Solutions, you will play a crucial role in bridging the gap between clinical staff, IT teams, and data analysts to optimize data usage for patient care and operational efficiency. You will assist in managing and integrating healthcare data systems while ensuring compliance with healthcare regulations. This is an exciting opportunity to work at the intersection of healthcare delivery and technology, helping to shape the future of patient care through data-driven decisions.

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Health Information Management, Data Science, or related field.
